    Welsh Society Sports Tournaments
    1st May midnight - 31st July midnight
    Location: Warwick Sports and Wellness Hub, CV4 7EU
    Warwick Welsh Society's 5-a-side and netball teams are back for Term 3. The 5-a-side team plays every Friday and the netball team every Saturday All are welcome to join regardless of ability.

    Development Squad Training Sessions
    20th May midnight - 30th January midnight
    Location: Sports and Wellness Hub - Squash Courts
    These sessions are open to everybody. They are led by an experienced team player and are a brilliant way to develop your squash in a fun and friendly environment for just £10 a term!
    Sports Clubs

    Cheese, Chocolate & Spanish Tapas & Movie Night 🧀🍫 (Spanish Studies Society X Cheese and Chocolate Society)
    29th September - 8pm
    Location: R0.03 (Ramphal Building, Ground Floor)
    Join Cheese & Chocolate Society and Spanish Studies Society for an evening of delicious cheese and chocolate tasting, accompanied by authentic Spanish tapas and a Spanish film playing in the background.
    Societies

    30th September - 2pm
    Location: University Piazza
    Women Only, join us for a morning of shooting at the Range!

    30th September - 5pm

    Clay Pigeon Taster
    30th September - 5pm
    Location: University Piazza
    Ever wanted to try your hand at clay pigeon shooting? Join us for our Freshers Week taster session, where you’ll get the chance to fire 25 live cartridges under the guidance of qualified instructors.
    Sports Clubs
    Cheese, Chocolate & Wine Tasting 🍷🧀🍫 (Cheese and Chocolate Society X Winesoc)
    1st October 5pm -
    Location: OC1.06 (The Oculus, First Floor)
    Indulge your taste buds at our collaborative tasting event with WineSoc! Sample a selection of cheeses, chocolates, wines, and enjoy a sophisticated yet welcoming evening with fellow students.

    Hot Chocolate Movie Night ☕🎬 with Cheese & Chocolate Society
    4th October 6pm -
    Location: S0.20 (Social Sciences North and South, Ground Floor)
    Round off Freshers' Week with a cosy movie night featuring rich hot chocolate, great company, and a feel-good film. Bring your friends, settle in, and enjoy the perfect relaxed end to an exciting week on campus.
    Societies
    Freshers Trip 2026
    23rd October 5pm - 25th October 7pm
    Location: Brecon (South Wales)
    Kick off the year with our first white water trip! Perfect for anyone looking to experience white water for the first time. No white water experience required.
    Sports Clubs
    Wychavon 2026
    31st October 10am - 8pm
    Location: TDMS (The De Montfort School), Four Pools Road, Evesham, Worcestershire WR11 1DQ
    Wychavon Festival of Brass is an annual brass band competition held in Evesham. We will be competing in the Fourth section and playing a 20-minute set in the hopes of retaining our trophy!

    About Warwick SU

    The Students’ Union is the focal point of campus life here at Warwick, but what exactly is it that makes your Union so unique? Find out more about the SU and what we do.

    Contact Us

    We only exist to provide services for our members, so your feedback really is important to us.

    Get in touch with your questions, comments and complaints and we’ll get back to you within three working days.
